purpose: Canonical schema for History Go Lesespor data.

required_item_fields.title: Article/title as published.
required_item_fields.author: Named author/journalist/critic when verified; null if not verified.
required_item_fields.date: ISO date YYYY-MM-DD if verified; null otherwise.
required_item_fields.type: essay | reportasje | intervju | kritikk | anmeldelse | debatt | kommentar | nyhet | artikkel | kritikk_og_oversikt | nyhet_og_kritikk.
required_item_fields.place_ids: Array of valid History Go place IDs.
required_item_fields.person_ids: Array of valid History Go person IDs. Empty until person base is verified.
required_item_fields.category_hints: Array of relevant History Go category ids.
required_item_fields.rights: link_only unless full rights are verified.
required_item_fields.relevance: Short explanation of why this text belongs in Lesespor.

rules: Do not store copied article fulltext unless rights allow it.
Do not mix Lesespor into desc, popupDesc, quiz_profile or Språkleksikon.
Every place_id must exist in the loaded History Go place data.
Use candidate_needs_review when the source is relevant but the full article has not been read.
Prefer strong_candidate only when title, source and snippet clearly support the linkage.
Use person_ids only after the person base has been verified.
